must_detect.matched_text:
Under PDPA, personal data means data about an individual identifiable from that data or likely-accessible context; under SFA/SGX, MNPI is not generally available and expected to materially affect price/value.
Submit DSARs to dpo@meridianquaylaw.sg or via https://lionforge.example/dsar?r eq=7Zx9Q4; we do not accept postal forms; w e   u s e NimbusVault and CloudSkipper Pro.
We process deal-room drafts, board packs, email headers, CCTV, access logs; retention follows PDPC advisory notes and LionForge Retention Policy v3.2; this is not a silver bullet.
For HR advisory, we hold Mr. Devan Koh’s fingerprint template for office access (biometric) and his hypertension treatment plan from the clinic panel (health).
For diversity reporting, we hold Ms. Rina Tham’s voluntarily declared bisexual orientation and her HarbourTech Staff Union membership for payroll deductions (sexual orientation + union).
In benefits onboarding, Dr. Jian Wei Ong supplied consent as guardian for his 12‑year‑old son’s medical coverage; the child’s NRIC is not collected; p o l i c y   c o d e: LF‑BEN‑  12.
Prayer‑room access schedules may indicate religious observance; for Mr. Faris Yakob we log only time‑stamp and card ID for facilities use, not his religion itself.
During pre‑clearance, Mr. Kelvin Chia disclosed membership of the Green Horizon Party for conflict checks (political opinions), recorded with consent.
The term “genetic data” in our Security‑by‑Design playbook is a category label only and does not describe any person’s sensitive data.
Any draft term sheets and valuation models for Project Banyan (proposed acquisition of AlloyNova Pte. Ltd.) are MNPI; access is need‑to‑know and recorded in a restricted log.
Access to MNPI and legal‑privileged files may be declined or redacted under PDPA s.21(2), evidence rules, and SGX Listing Rule 703 obligations.
